entry.title: A new home for the Ocsigen blog
entry.summary: The Ocsigen blog is back, and it is now built like the rest of the Ocsigen website: with wodoc, our odoc-based static site generator. Each post is a plain .mld file — the same lightweight markup we use for the manuals and the API document…

entry.title: Documenting OCaml projects with wodoc
entry.summary: wodoc turns .mld and .mli sources into a complete, styled website — not just API documentation. The very site you are reading is built with it.
